block_00: New Indicators: How to Choose the Right One?
block_01: With over 100 powerful indicators now available on the IQ Option platform, it can be challenging to find the one that best suits your trading style. No need to worry — we’re here to help!
block_02: All of the indicators on the IQ Option platform fall into one of six major categories, each with their own distinct characteristics and use. Discover the type of indicator that fits your preferences and make it part of your trading arsenal today.
block_05: One of the pillars of technical analysis theory is that price movements will often repeat and are predictable. That's where wedge patterns come in.
block_08: Trading can be a tricky endeavor, especially for those who are just starting. Get ahead of the game by learning how to avoid these 7 common mistakes made by novices.
